channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: ‘Reprehensible’: New wave of Iranian missiles, drones target Gulf nations
item.description: Gulf states lambast Iran for its continued strikes on their territories, with Qatar urging all sides to de-escalate.

item.title: Moment building in Beirut southern suburbs was targeted by Israeli strike
item.description: This is the moment a building in Beirut’s southern suburbs was targeted by an Israeli attack.

item.title: Iran says 1,255 people killed in US-Israeli attacks, mostly civilians
item.description: Deputy Health Minister Ali Jafarian tells Al Jazeera air attacks damage dozens of healthcare facilities.

item.title: Iraq coach urges FIFA to delay World Cup playoff amid US-Israel war on Iran
item.description: Graham Arnold says a delay to the March 31 fixture would allow the scattered members of his team to gather and prepare.

item.title: Which US and Israeli military companies are profiting from the Iran war?
item.description: Defence stocks reach all-time highs, driven by need to produce billions of dollars of weapons systems.

item.title: ‘We are going make a tonne of money’: US Senator Graham on US war on Iran
item.description: The veteran GOP senator appears to suggest that the war on Iran was launched to gain control over its oil supplies.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 10 of US-Israel attacks?
item.description: Mojtaba Khamenei has been selected as Iran’s new supreme leader. Attacks continue and oil prices have spiked.

item.title: Crowd chants ‘save our girls’ at bus carrying Iran women’s team
item.description: Crowds chased a bus carrying Iran’s women’s football team in Australia, chanting 'save our girls'.

item.title: Carney confirms: When Washington whistles, Ottawa salutes
item.description: The Canadian prime minister was quick to jump on the Iran war bandwagon, seemingly forgetting his own speech at Davos.

item.title: UAE releases video of Iranian drone interception
item.description: The UAE’s Ministry of Defence released video it says shows Iranian drones being intercepted and destroyed.
